core_principles: Tension over symmetry. Avoid center-everything diseases.
Minimal, elegant, and professional. Deep contrast between stark white backgrounds and rich deep violet.
Use 'Crystal Glass' over images for a high-end luxury feel.
Generous spacing: Let the content breathe using Tailwind's p-12 to p-32 scales.
anti_patterns: No 'Inter' or generic sans fonts for headings.
No full-screen dark overlays that hide hero images (use max bg-black/40 or gradient overlays if needed, but since it's a light theme, use bg-white/60 with blur).

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-[4rem] font-light tracking-tighter leading-none text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-normal tracking-tight text-slate-900

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous spacing: py-24 or py-32 for sections. gap-8 or gap-12 for grids.

grid_strategy.services: Mode A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Asymmetric. Mix 2-column wide spans with 1-column tall spans to create tension. Do not use 3 equal boring columns.
grid_strategy.stats: Grid Borders pattern. Technical look with border-r and border-b on items.

layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align paragraphs and dense content. Center-align only major hero text if it serves a cinematic purpose.

buttons.primary: bg-violet-900 text-white hover:bg-violet-800 transition-colors px-8 py-4 rounded-md font-medium shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(76,29,149,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-violet-900 border border-violet-900 hover:bg-violet-50 transition-colors px-8 py-4 rounded-md font-medium

cards.style: Flat, cardless feel or 1px subtle border (#F1F5F9). No heavy drop shadows. On hover, translate-y-1 with subtle shadow-lg.
cards.padding: p-8 or p-12 inside bordered containers to prevent collision.

header.style: Sticky top-0 z-50 Crystal Glass (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-100).
header.logo: Text-based 'OMNISCENT®' using Outfit font, font-semibold, tracking-widest.

component_rules.navigation: Desktop: Visible text links. Mobile: Hamburger menu.
component_rules.data_testids: MANDATORY on all buttons, links, and forms (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='nav-services-link').

hero.description: Abstract 3D architectural composition, white marble and frosted glass with subtle deep violet and icy light blue lighting, representing 'a step forward' in finance.
hero.usage_instructions: Use as full-bleed background in the Hero section. Overlay with 'Crystal Glass' or a white-to-transparent gradient so dark text remains perfectly readable.

services_background.description: Elegant minimal geometric pattern, pure white background with faint violet and light blue reflections.
services_background.usage_instructions: Use as a subtle textured background behind the Services ('Servizi') section.

stats_visual.description: Abstract data visualization art resembling orderflow.
stats_visual.usage_instructions: Place adjacent to the 'Statistiche' section to break up text-heavy data.

trading_environment.description: A home office setup featuring multiple monitors displaying trading charts and data analysis.
trading_environment.usage_instructions: Use inside a bento grid cell in the Services section to visually represent the Trading/Orderflow courses.

team_portrait.description: A man in a suit sitting in a chair in an elegant office.
team_portrait.usage_instructions: Use in the 'Chi siamo/Team' section to establish professional credibility.

elements: Subheadline: 'Formazione privata di trading. Analisi dell'orderflow e creazione di fondi PAMM.'
Secondary CTA: 'Scopri di più' (scrolls to services)
Item 1: Analisi dell'Orderflow (Swing & Scalping) - use trading_environment image
Item 3: Creazione Fondi PAMM - Highlighted card with light blue accent
Metrics: Performance, Studenti, PAMM creati. Use Grid Borders pattern.
Format: Clean typography-focused quotes, no heavy cards. Just large text and author names.
Content: Missione dell'azienda, foto del team (team_portrait image).
Implementation: Shadcn Accordion component, minimal styling, 1px bottom border per item.

animation_guidelines.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis is MANDATORY to ensure the premium feel.
animation_guidelines.interactions: Hover states on all buttons and cards. Fade-up entrance animations for bento grid items staggered on scroll.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-react for elegant, thin-weight icons.
All complex interactions (FAQ accordion) MUST use Shadcn UI components but heavily styled to remove the default 'Vercel' look. Ensure pure white backgrounds and 1px #F1F5F9 borders.
Do NOT use HTML mailto in a complex form. Since all requests are via email, use direct `mailto:support@omniscent.space` links inside stylish buttons.
For the hero image, do not cover it with a completely dark overlay. The image is light and architectural; use a white gradient or a slight white blur overlay so dark text is readable.
Ensure the Instagram link opens in a new tab.
Implement `data-testid` on every interactable element as required.
